recommendations.title: Backtrace
recommendations.overview: The lone surviving thief of a violent armored car robbery is sprung from a high security facility and administered an experimental drug.

recommendations.title: The Prince
recommendations.overview: A family man who turns out to be a retired mob enforcer must travel across the country to find his daughter who has gone missing.

recommendations.title: Officer Down
recommendations.overview: When a cop's crooked past comes back to get him, can he do the right thing, or will he succumb to the threats of his dangerous connections?

recommendations.title: 10 Minutes Gone

recommendations.title: Vice

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.

recommendations.title: Blood Diamond

recommendations.title: Welcome to the Punch
recommendations.overview: When notorious criminal Jacob Sternwood is forced to return to London, it gives detective Max Lewinsky one last chance to take down the man he's always been after.
